name: zacatl-fastify-sqlite-backend
description: Fastify + SQLite (Sequelize) backend using Zacatl framework

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tsx ../../../../build-scripts-esm/build/fix-esm.js dist && npx tsx ../../../../scripts/build/rewrite-runtime-aliases.ts dist @zacatl/ @sentzunhat/zacatl/
